facts.claim: 62 rules, 9 categories: physiological-calculation 26, care-pathway 14, data-validation 13, drug-dosing 3, clinical-scoring 2, alert-threshold 1, billing-administrative 1, scheduling-operational 1, triage-eligibility 1.
By type: formula 18, decision-tree 8, validation 16, workflow 12, threshold 6, scoring 1, eligibility 1.
Status: OK 42, DISCREPANCY 15, AMBIGUOUS 5. Verification verdict: NOT_APPLICABLE 31, UNVERIFIABLE 14, VERIFIED 8, DISCREPANCY 9.

Themes: (1) intake/output ledger + 24h/cumulative balance arithmetic; (2) a 07:00-07:00 nursing 'turno' window applied inconsistently across 8+ rules; (3) intake/output/vital-signs decision trees with PT-BR drug/solution/electrolyte vocabularies; (4) record lifecycle: soft-delete, CPF+PIN digital signature, permission gating duplicated 3x across Entrada/Saida/SinaisVitais; (5) PDF/overview-grid presentation with its own bugs; (6) scheduled auto-provisioning of daily balance rows for homecare beds.
Units: volumes in mL (entradas/saidas.quantidade, balanco_24h, balanco_acumulado, balanco_diurno, balanco_noturno); temperature Celsius; HGT (capillary glucose) mg/dL; BP (pas/pad) mmHg.

Default charting volumes are hardcoded institutional conventions: dieta_enteral defaults 200mL (020), presenca_espontanea='presente' defaults 200mL (021), presente+/++/+++ maps to 100/200/300mL (022) — none clinically sourced.

constraints.text: MUST NOT port the 07:00-07:00 window as implemented: uses criado_em__day (day-of-month only, breaks across month boundaries); hour>=7 branch's 2nd queryset predicate is unsatisfiable, silently dropping 00:00-07:00 data. Affects RULE-006..011 (24h balance, ganhos, diureses, evacuacoes, temp max, HGT max).

MUST fix elapsed-hours helper (tempo_criacao): uses timedelta.seconds (wraps at 24h) not total_seconds(), making sepsis recency guards (<=24h,<=12h,<2h) unreliable for records >24h old. Triplicated in entradas/saidas/sinais_vitais.py.

MUST NOT reproduce visao-geral 2h bucketing's inverted range: the 22:00-00:00 bucket is an empty SQL BETWEEN so that slot always aggregates to 0 (data lost); inclusive boundaries also double-count exact-boundary timestamps.
Null/zero-sum handling is inconsistent across near-identical helpers (None vs 0 vs falsy-0-as-None); normalize to one correct null-safe sum in v2.
balanco_24h is an incremental accumulator updated on create/delete but never corrected on edit of quantidade — v2 must recompute from source rows, not maintain a mutable running total.
MUST NOT carry the operator-precedence bug in presence-to-volume mapping (presenca and tipo=='evacuacao' or tipo=='vomito_retorno_sonda' parses as (presenca AND evacuacao) OR vomito).
The 07:00-07:00 shift boundary is an institutional convention, not a clinical cutoff (no Sepsis-3/KDIGO/ASPEN basis) — RATIFY whether v2 keeps it fixed or makes it facility-configurable.
PT-BR controlled vocabularies (drug/solution/electrolyte/consciousness lists) MUST be preserved verbatim incl. accents.

load_bearing_rules.what: Cumulative balance across all days for a bed/admission = intake minus output
24h balance over 07:00-07:00 window via buggy month-agnostic helper
Urine output over 07:00-07:00, feeds KDIGO-relevant totals
Evolution-form 24h rollup; commented intended formula diverges from ledger def used elsewhere
12-bucket 2h overview grid; 22:00-00:00 bucket inverted/empty, always loses data
Intake create adds quantidade to running balanco_24h, uncorrected on edit
Shared elapsed-hours helper uses .seconds not total_seconds(), breaks sepsis recency guards
presente+/++/+++ to 100/200/300mL mapping has operator-precedence bug
List-endpoint auto-create mis-dates new records to 'yesterday' pre-07:00
Scheduled task auto-creates one BalancoHidrico/day per occupied homecare bed

systemic_issues.issue: Month-agnostic day-of-month window bug + unsatisfiable 2nd-queryset predicate dropping 00:00-07:00 data
Inconsistent null/zero handling across near-identical sum helpers
Elapsed-hours unit bug undermining sepsis time-window criteria
Inverted/empty SQL range causing silent data loss in overview bucketing
Desktop/mobile/PDF display drift (negative-value visibility, PA-row gating)
Copy-paste bug: signing a Saida posts to the 'entrada' endpoint
Triplicated auth/signature logic across serializers, inconsistent missing-empresa handling
Dead code: BalancoHidricoFilter on 'dia' never attached to any viewset
Incremental (non-recomputed) balance accumulator drifts on record edits

domain_notes: Feeds AKI (KDIGO oliguria via urine-output totals, RULE-008) and hemodynamics/volume-status; vital-signs recency (016/017) feeds sepsis screening; 07:00 shift + audit/signature/permission plumbing (026,033,034,042,045) are platform/governance; presentation bugs (013,018,025,028) belong in a shared dashboard component, not domain clinical logic.

vocabularies.name: Drug/antibiotic/BI vocabularies
values: Full lists (30+ drugs, 25+ antibiotics) preserved verbatim in disposition shard, omitted here for size

open_questions: Should v2's 07:00-07:00 nursing-day boundary stay fixed or be facility-configurable?
Authoritative 24h fluid-balance formula: entrada-saida ledger (RULE-006) vs gains-(diuresis+vomit) per commented-out RULE-012 intent — requires opening trilha_homecare/utils.py.
